name: Autonomous Forest Obstacle Avoidance Configuration
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist deploying a drone for low-altitude sub-canopy flights to map forest undergrowth. The drone has just been equipped with a 360-degree LiDAR connected to Telem2 (Serial 2). Configure the 8 parameters related to serial communication, proximity sensing, and obstacle avoidance as specified in the hardware integration specification at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/lidar_integration_spec.txt.
